paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced **instruction tuning**, a method where a large pretrained language model (137B) is finetuned on diverse NLP datasets expressed via natural language instructions, substantially improving zero-shot generalization across 25+ unseen tasks. Unlike prompting or supervised fine-tuning, instruction tuning enables models to adapt to novel tasks described purely through instructions
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: Collection of web documents (~2.49 TB PE tokens, ~90% English, including code/dialog data)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding (NLI, QA, translation, coreference resolution), instruction-following, and cross-task adaptation
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enhancing zero-shot learning capabilities of large language models
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Causal language modeling (web documents, dialog data, Wikipedia)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (finetuning on >60 NLP datasets via natural language instructions)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces FLAN-Tiny as a base model demonstrating that instruction tuning enables zero-shot generalization across diverse tasks through multi-task supervised fine-tuning on instruction clusters
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, zero-shot task execution
raw_extraction.research_problem: Enabling large language models to generalize to unseen tasks through instruction tuning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (multi-task supervised fine-tuning on instruction clusters)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Explores how instruction tuning impacts zero-shot capabilities across varying model scales, showing that smaller models may suffer reduced generalization due to capacity constraints
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, zero-shot task execution
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scaling effects of instruction tuning on zero-shot learning performance
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (multi-task supervised fine-tuning on instruction clusters)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Shows that larger models benefit significantly from instruction tuning, achieving substantial zero-shot improvements while maintaining strong generalization capabilities
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding and generation, zero-shot task execution
raw_extraction.research_problem: Evaluating instruction tuning effectiveness across model scales for zero-shot learning
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (multi-task supervised fine-tuning on instruction clusters)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Highlights that instruction tuning becomes increasingly effective for very large models, allowing them to leverage remaining capacity for cross-task generalization beyond instruction-specific learning
raw_extraction.application: Advanced general-purpose language understanding and generation, specialized task execution
raw_extraction.research_problem: Understanding optimal scaling laws for instruction tuning in large language models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (multi-task supervised fine-tuning on instruction clusters)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Demonstrates that extremely large models benefit most from instruction tuning, achieving superior zero-shot performance across diverse tasks while showcasing robust generalization capabilities
raw_extraction.application: High-capacity general-purpose language understanding and generation, complex task execution
raw_extraction.research_problem: Investigating instruction tuning benefits at the extreme end of model scaling
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning (multi-task supervised fine-tuning on instruction clusters)
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces FLAN-T5, a family of language models trained on a unified text-to-text objective and finetuned via instruction tuning to achieve strong zero-shot performance across multiple tasks without task-specific supervision
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot task generalization, instruction-following, natural language understanding/generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose language understanding and generation through zero-shot learning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Unified text-to-text pretraining (masked language modeling + next-token prediction)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with diverse templates for zero-shot generalization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces FLAN-T5, a family of language models trained on a unified text-to-text objective and finetuned via instruction tuning to achieve strong zero-shot performance across multiple tasks without task-specific supervision
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot task generalization, instruction-following, natural language understanding/generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose language understanding and generation through zero-shot learning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Unified text-to-text pretraining (masked language modeling + next-token prediction)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with diverse templates for zero-shot generalization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces FLAN-T5, a family of language models trained on a unified text-to-text objective and finetuned via instruction tuning to achieve strong zero-shot performance across multiple tasks without task-specific supervision
raw_extraction.application: Zero-shot task generalization, instruction-following, natural language understanding/generation
raw_extraction.research_problem: General-purpose language understanding and generation through zero-shot learning
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Unified text-to-text pretraining (masked language modeling + next-token prediction)
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning with diverse templates for zero-shot generalization
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners

raw_extraction.innovation: Introduced **instruction tuning**—fine-tuning large language models on diverse instruction datasets to improve zero-shot performance on unseen tasks. Unlike prior MTL approaches focused on supervised task improvement, FLAN leverages instruction-based fine-tuning to generalize across novel tasks without explicit task-specific labels
raw_extraction.pretraining_corpus: FLAN (a large-scale text corpus, ~2 trillion tokens)
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding, zero-shot task execution, and instruction-following capabilities across diverse NLP tasks
raw_extraction.research_problem: Scalable zero-shot learning and generalization in large language models
raw_extraction.finetuning_task: Instruction tuning + zero-shot generalization across diverse task clusters
raw_extraction.paper_title: Finetuned Language Models Are Zero-Shot Learners
